sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65336" key="megakleh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεγᾰ-κλεής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n65336.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">very famous</tr_>, acc. (as if from <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μεγακλής</foreign>)<cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μεγακλέᾰ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.4</biblScope></bibl></cit>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n65336.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> parox. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Μεγακλέης</foreign> as pr. n.</sense> </entryFree>
